prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约54949→114789→86255→69342→68439，2022年因省控线大幅下降出现位次骤降，2023–2025年逐年回升并趋于稳定；2025年基准约68439名，近3年累计前移约4.8万名，呈明显回暖趋势；本省理科（物理类）计划2021年380人、2022年393人、2023年358人、2024年364人、2025年483人；2026年计划561人，较2025年扩招78人（+16.1%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第131名，近年排名在127–136区间波动，整体稳定；声誉文件中无新疆大学相关舆情记录，声誉评价中性；抖音热度排名第72（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量中等偏低，未出现明显报考热度信号；无历史投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无A-及以上学科，整体学科实力在211高校中处于中后段，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度偏热至高热推荐，与该校理工科招生专业匹配度高；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退；本省2026年高考总人数约120万（较2025年大幅增加），虽仅有总人数无分科数据，但按近年比例估算物理类考生约增10–15万，竞争加剧；省控线数据2026年缺失，；新疆大学位于乌鲁木齐，距河南较远，地域偏好对河南考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在河南招生占比约6–8%（2025年物理类483人/全国约6000+人），属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次68439、2026年大幅扩招16.1%、本省考生总数大幅增加（竞争加剧）、学校声誉中性、地域距离较远等因素；预测最低位次约74569名，区间74069–75069名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 54949 → 114789 → 86255 → 69342 → 68439. In 2022, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line, the ranking plummeted, but from 2023 to 2025, it gradually recovered and stabilized. The baseline for 2025 is about 68439, with a cumulative forward shift of approximately 48,000 places over the past three years, showing a clear warming trend. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 380 in 2021, 393 in 2022, 358 in 2023, 364 in 2024, and 483 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 561, an increase of 78 students (+16.1%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 131st in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, overall stable. There are no relevant public opinion records for Xinjiang University in the reputation file, and the reputation evaluation is neutral. Douyin popularity ranking is 72 (rated as 'average'), with moderately low exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious application heat signal. No historical record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University has no A- or above disciplines, and its overall discipline strength is in the middle to lower segment among 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are socially hot to very hot recommendations, matching well with the university's science and engineering enrollment majors. Majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance exam is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025). Although only total numbers are available without subject breakdown, based on recent proportions, the number of physics category candidates is estimated to increase by about 100,000 to 150,000, intensifying competition. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Henan, and geographical preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on Henan candidates' willingness to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 6–8% (483 physics category students in 2025 out of approximately 6,000+ nationwide), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 68439, a significant 16.1% expansion in 2026, a large increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensified competition), neutral university reputation, and geographical distance, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 74569, with a range of 74069 to 75069.

Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<74000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings near the upper limit (>75000) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety.
